events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Backstabbing (push-in spring terminals) is listed for 15A/#14 AWG only — using it on a 20A circuit (typically #12 AWG) violates the device's listing under NEC 110.14(A)/110.3(B), independent of the "legal on 15A" caveat. Recommended corrective action is re-termination on screw or clamp-type terminals before closeout.
